hint: Begin with feature-developer, then hand off or call workflow-advance when Execution is complete.

orchestration.instruction:
ORCHESTRATION GUIDE for Execution phase:

1. START: Activate feature-developer agent
   - Review agent playbook: .context/agents/feature-developer.md
   - Understand responsibilities and outputs

2. DISCOVER: Find all agents for this phase
   - Call: agent({ action: "orchestrate", phase: "E" })
   - Review: Recommended agents and their roles

3. SEQUENCE: Plan agent handoff order
   - Call: agent({ action: "getSequence", phases: ["E"] })
   - Follow: Suggested sequence for optimal workflow

4. EXECUTE: Perform work and handoffs
   - Work: Complete tasks as feature-developer
   - Handoff: workflow-manage({ action: "handoff", from: "feature-developer", to: "<next-agent>", artifacts: [...] })
   - Repeat: Continue through sequence until phase complete

5. ADVANCE: Move to next phase
   - Call: workflow-advance({ outputs: [...] })
   - Review: Next phase orchestration guidance

recommendedSkills.name: commit-message
recommendedSkills.description: Generate commit messages following conventional commits with scope detection

recommendedSkills.name: test-generation
recommendedSkills.description: Generate comprehensive test cases for code

recommendedSkills.name: refactoring
recommendedSkills.description: Safe code refactoring with step-by-step approach

recommendedSkills.name: bug-investigation
recommendedSkills.description: Systematic bug investigation and root cause analysis

orchestrationSteps: 1. Discover agents for Execution phase: agent({ action: "orchestrate", phase: "E" })
2. Review recommended sequence: agent({ action: "getSequence", phases: ["E"] })
3. Begin with feature-developer agent - follow playbook at .context/agents/feature-developer.md
4. Execute handoffs: workflow-manage({ action: "handoff", from: "feature-developer", to: "backend-specialist", artifacts: ["output.md"] })

quickStart.firstStep: Call agent({ action: "orchestrate", phase: "E" }) to discover agents
nextActions: 3. Begin with feature-developer - follow playbook at .context/agents/feature-developer.md
4. Use workflow-manage to execute handoffs between agents
5. Call workflow-advance when phase is complete
